info.title: AuroraChat for Switch
info.author: 3pm
info.details:
A chatting application for the 3DS and Wii U, now on the Nintendo Switch.
AuroraChat is a real-time chatting application made originally for the 3DS family, now cross-platform.
This is the official Switch port of AuroraChat.
All messages are moderated. The Code of Conduct is available on the GitHub repository.

changelog:
v0.6.0: Brand New Switch Beginnings
First ever Switch Release of AuroraChat. Same functionality as the 3DS version, with some advantages:
- 720p Support
- Auto-Scrolling
